subject: Augusta Ada King, Countess of Lovelace (Ada Lovelace)
research_angle: Ada at the frontier of human-computer communication — discovering how to speak to machines to get productive results. Resonates with FAICC's ethos around directing AI systems.
notes: Focus areas: the 1843 Notes on the Analytical Engine (especially Note G), Lovelace-Babbage correspondence, her philosophical framing of 'poetical science' and machine capability.
